title: Patch CommandCenterUI hcom send CSRF guard
description: Patch the local CommandCenterUI app server so send-enabled hcom POSTs reject cross-origin browser submissions and malformed numeric inputs return clean 400 responses.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/hcom/send rejects cross-origin Origin or Referer when present
Same-origin or no-origin localhost tool requests continue to work through existing hcom identity gates
Malformed limit and Content-Length inputs return clean 400 JSON responses
